description: Implement FGAP-090 — wire pi's eager guidance hooks into the pi-context extension so the in-pi LLM receives framework guidance. PRIMARY: a before_agent_start handler that APPENDS a static topic->tool-call pointer/orientation block to event.systemPrompt (append never replace — runtime chains across extensions per dist/core/extensions/runner.js:700-739; returning nothing resets to base per agent-session.js:791-796), mirroring shipped exemplar examples/extensions/claude-rules.ts:64-85 and pi-core's docs-pointer dist/core/system-prompt.js:94-100. Block = a topic->TOOL-CALL map (the constrained agent has no read tool, so route to tools not file paths): vocabulary/relation_types/block_kinds -> read-config / read-samples-catalog (authoritative, never invent canonical names); schema -> read-schema; live tools+signatures -> list-tools; add a block kind -> read-samples-catalog then write-schema + amend-config; bootstrap -> /context start; + grounding directives (queryable, don't confabulate, FGAP-092). ~12-18 lines, STATIC (no substrate I/O, works pre-bootstrap). SECONDARY: a resources_discover handler returning { skillPaths: [abs packages/pi-context/skills/pi-context] } so skills surface as <available_skills> metadata (dist/core/skills.js:258-277), mirroring examples/extensions/dynamic-resources.
acceptance_criteria: before_agent_start handler returns { systemPrompt } that STARTS WITH event.systemPrompt (append-not-replace) and contains the topic->tool-call routing + grounding directives + tool names read-samples-catalog/read-config/read-schema/list-tools/write-schema/amend-config
resources_discover handler returns { skillPaths: [<abs skills/pi-context path>] } and the path exists on disk with valid name/description frontmatter
new orientation.ts uses fileURLToPath(import.meta.url) not import.meta.dirname (prod-ESM/tsx-CJS safety)
unit tests assert both handlers (mock .on capture + synthetic event emit)

runtime demo: a live constrained pi session (launch-constrained-pi.sh) shows the pointer block in the agent context — agent answers vocabulary/add-a-block-kind via the tool-call routing, not confabulation (the FGAP-090 empirical gate)
fresh-context adversarial confirms append-not-replace + tight block + correct skillPath + live-session reach
notes: Resolved decisions: topic->tool-call adaptation (no read in constrained harness); static MVP block (no per-turn substrate I/O); resources_discover surfaces skill METADATA — bodies are read-gated so constrained agent gets metadata-only, full value unconstrained; delivering skill CONTENT to the constrained agent via an element-read tool is FEAT-007 (out of scope). Addresses FGAP-090 (corrected: skills CAN reach via these hooks; cause was unwired hooks). Keystone unblocking FGAP-066/FEAT-007. Exemplars: examples/extensions/claude-rules.ts, dynamic-resources, prompt-customizer.ts. created_by/created_at stamped by orchestrator filing.
